title: VSCode extension for Verb — implementation plan
summary: Task-by-task implementation plan for shipping an unpublished VSCode extension with LSP and tree-sitter semantic highlighting for .verb files.
notes: Implementation/execution plan document (task graph, waves, developer/reviewer checklists), not an ADR/PRD/SPEC. No Context/Decision/Consequences sections, no user stories/acceptance criteria, and it explicitly defers technical-contract detail to a separate SPEC file it references. Classified as DOC (supporting context/process documentation); low ambiguity toward SPEC due to presence of technical details, but those are described as inherited from the referenced spec, not originated here.
